body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/bills/exportPDF 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/bills/exportPDF 
 ## 接口描述 
根据单据打印模板打印单据信息到PDF流中，是否打印发票、图片附件可选。 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"billIds","required":true,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","desc":"%20%E7%9B%AE%E5%89%8D%E4%BB%85%E5%85%81%E8%AE%B8%E4%B8%80%E4%B8%AA%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"%5B2023000000000000%5D"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"printPattern","label":"%E6%89%93%E5%8D%B0%E8%8C%83%E5%9B%B4%EF%BC%9A%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E3%80%81%E5%9B%BE%E7%89%87%E9%99%84%E4%BB%B6","desc":"%20img%EF%BC%9A%E5%85%A8%E9%83%A8%E9%99%84%E4%BB%B6%EF%BC%88%E5%8C%85%E6%8B%AC%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E9%99%84%E4%BB%B6%E3%80%81%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E9%99%84%E4%BB%B6%E3%80%81%E8%B4%B9%E7%94%A8%E9%99%84%E4%BB%B6%E3%80%81%E5%AE%A1%E6%89%B9%E8%AF%84%E8%AE%BA%E9%99%84%E4%BB%B6%E3%80%81%E6%94%AF%E4%BB%98%E5%9B%9E%E5%8D%95%EF%BC%8C%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81pdf%E4%B8%8E%E5%9B%BE%E7%89%87%E6%A0%BC%E5%BC%8F%EF%BC%89%EF%BC%9B%0Ainvoice%EF%BC%9A%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E9%99%84%E4%BB%B6%EF%BC%9B%0AbillAttachment%EF%BC%9A%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E9%99%84%E4%BB%B6%EF%BC%9B%0AexpenseAttachment%EF%BC%9A%E8%B4%B9%E7%94%A8%E9%99%84%E4%BB%B6%EF%BC%9B%0AapprAttachment%EF%BC%9A%E5%AE%A1%E6%89%B9%E8%AF%84%E8%AE%BA%E9%99%84%E4%BB%B6%EF%BC%9B%0Astatement%EF%BC%9A%E6%94%AF%E4%BB%98%E5%9B%9E%E5%8D%95%EF%BC%9B%0A%0A","exampleValue":"%5B%22invoice%22%2C%22billAttachment%22%2C%20%22apprAttachment%22%2C%22expenseAttachment%22%2C%22statement%22%5D"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"invoiceScope","desc":"%20electronic%EF%BC%9A%E7%94%B5%E5%AD%90%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%EF%BC%9B%0Apaper%EF%BC%9A%E7%BA%B8%E8%B4%A8%E7%9A%84","label":"%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%EF%BC%9A%E7%94%B5%E5%AD%90%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E3%80%81%E7%BA%B8%E8%B4%A8%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8","exampleValue":"%5B%22electronic%22%2C%22paper%22%5D"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"templateCode","required":true,"label":"%E6%89%93%E5%8D%B0%E6%A8%A1%E6%9D%BF%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"D000"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"empSeqId","label":"%E5%BD%93%E5%89%8D%E7%94%A8%E6%88%B7Id","exampleValue":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"printDetail","label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E6%89%93%E5%8D%B0%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E8%AF%A6%E6%83%85","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E4%B8%BAtrue%EF%BC%8C%E8%8B%A5%E4%B8%8D%E6%89%93%E5%8D%B0%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E8%AF%A6%E6%83%85%EF%BC%8C%E6%AD%A4%E5%A4%84%E4%BC%A0%E5%85%A5false"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"invoicePrintLayout","label":"%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E6%89%93%E5%8D%B0%E5%B8%83%E5%B1%80","exampleValue":"%22one%22","desc":"%20%E4%B8%80%E9%A1%B5%E4%B8%80%E5%BC%A0%3A%22one%22%EF%BC%9B%0A%E4%B8%80%E9%A1%B5%E4%B8%A4%E5%BC%A0%3A%22two%22%EF%BC%9B%0A%E4%B8%80%E9%A1%B5%E5%9B%9B%E5%BC%A0%3A%22four%22%EF%BC%9B%0A%E8%8B%A5%E4%B8%8D%E4%BC%A0%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E4%B8%80%E9%A1%B5%E4%B8%80%E5%BC%A0"}}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"OPAUID","required":true,"maxLength":"8","label":"OPAUID","exampleValue":"XFT00001"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 ### **请求示例**
{BaseURL}/api/itrip-gateway/v1/bills/exportPDF?OPAUID=XFT00001
```json
{
    "billIds":[2023000000000000],
    "templateCode":"D000",
    "empSeqId":null,
    "printPattern":["invoice","billAttachment", "apprAttachment","expenseAttachment","statement"],
    "invoiceScope":["electronic","paper"],
    "invoicePrintLayout": "one",
    "printDetail":true
}
```
### **返回示例**
PDF格式的文件流。
  
## 错误码说明 
| **错误码** | **错误描述**        | **备注**                       |
|-----------|-------------------|--------|
| 200      | 成功                 | 无                            |

接口描述

调用方式

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

F%BC%9A%E7%94%B5%E5%AD%90%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E3%80%81%E7%BA%B8%E8%B4%A8%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8","exampleValue":"%5B%22electronic%22%2C%22paper%22%5D"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"templateCode","required":true,"label":"%E6%89%93%E5%8D%B0%E6%A8%A1%E6%9D%BF%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"D000"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"empSeqId","label":"%E5%BD%93%E5%89%8D%E7%94%A8%E6%88%B7Id","exampleValue":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"printDetail","label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E6%89%93%E5%8D%B0%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E8%AF%A6%E6%83%85","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E4%B8%BAtrue%EF%BC%8C%E8%8B%A5%E4%B8%8D%E6%89%93%E5%8D%B0%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E8%AF%A6%E6%83%85%EF%BC%8C%E6%AD%A4%E5%A4%84%E4%BC%A0%E5%85%A5false"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"invoicePrintLayout","label":"%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E6%89%93%E5%8D%B0%E5%B8%83%E5%B1%80","exampleValue":"%22one%22","desc":"%20%E4%B8%80%E9%A1%B5%E4%B8%80%E5%BC%A0%3A%22one%22%EF%BC%9B%0A%E4%B8%80%E9%A1%B5%E4%B8%A4%E5%BC%A0%3A%22two%22%EF%BC%9B%0A%E4%B8%80%E9%A1%B5%E5%9B%9B%E5%BC%A0%3A%22four%22%EF%BC%9B%0A%E8%8B%A5%E4%B8%8D%E4%BC%A0%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E4%B8%80%E9%A1%B5%E4%B8%80%E5%BC%A0"}}]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"OPAUID","required":true,"maxLength":"8","label":"OPAUID","exampleValue":"XFT00001"}}]}]}
